message:
feat(conformance): Add huh interactive forms conformance tests

Implements conformance tests for the huh crate verifying behavior matches
the original Go library:

- Input fields: basic, placeholder, char_limit, description, password, initial_value
- Select fields: basic, description, height, integer options
- Confirm fields: basic, description, labels, default_true
- Note fields: basic, title_only, next_label
- Themes: base, charm, dracula, catppuccin (mapped to base16)
- Form with theme creation

Tests skipped for unimplemented features:
- Text (textarea): multiline input not yet implemented
- MultiSelect: multi-selection not yet implemented
- Validation: Rust uses closure-based API vs Go built-in validators

Results: 22 PASS, 0 FAIL, 11 SKIP

Closes: charmed_rust-5x5.9, charmed_rust-5x5.9.2, charmed_rust-5x5.9.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
